title: Chewy Adventurous Portuguese Papaya Stir-fry
description: This low-calorie-friendly, earthy and adventurous papaya dish features a unique combination of cold water and a tadka to create a chewy texture.
instructions: Wash and peel the papaya, then slice it into thin strips.
In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, lime juice, sesame oil, and salt. Set aside.
Heat a pan over medium heat, add sesame oil and sauté ginger slices until fragrant.
Add papaya strips to the pan and cook for about 3-4 minutes or until slightly wilted but still crunchy.
Drizzle the prepared sauce over the papaya, toss well to coat evenly.
Remove from heat immediately to preserve its chewy texture. Garnish with coriander leaves before serving.
